sampled_assertions.text: Multimodal AI is one model that can receive, understand, and produce content across more than one type of input
shared representation space — a common internal language
Foundation models trained almost entirely on text from books, websites, and conversations
White coat in hospital means something different from white coat in kitchen
Video is the most data-rich modality
Five-step flow underlying GPT-4o and Google Gemini
Three patterns in In Practice section
Limitations: hallucination, modality gaps, compute cost, privacy

long_sentence_examples.text: it is one model that can receive, understand, and produce content across more than one type of input — for example, text, images, audio, and video — all inside the same system [1].
The challenge is that the numbers for a sentence and the numbers for a photograph are arranged in completely different ways — like two sets of building blocks that are different shapes and sizes.
